news.headline: What to Know About the Ebola Outbreak
news.summary: Aid agencies are racing to help health workers in the Democratic Republic of Congo. The virus is known to have killed at least 140 people, but the true toll may be far higher.

news.headline: Botched investigation sparks outrage
news.summary: A funeral has been held for 11-year-old Lyhanna. Her murder has sparked a national debate over child sexual abuse and failures of the French judicial system.
